summary: The diff modifies App.tsx and CharacterSelectScreen.tsx to fix the 'Enter The Realm' button's dead click handler. App.tsx fixes handleSelectCharacter to accept (id, character) directly and eliminate the silent early-return guard. CharacterSelectScreen.tsx is updated with a revised onSelectCharacter signature. Both REQ-75 and REQ-76 appear to be addressed based on the file summaries, though the diffs are truncated and some implementation details cannot be fully verified.
